Description: A breathable everyday shirt with a relaxed fit, button front, and soft cotton finish for all-day comfort.

Description: A breathable everyday shirt with a relaxed fit, button front, and soft cotton finish for all-day comfort.
Care Instructions: Machine wash cold with similar colors. Tumble dry low. Warm iron if needed.
